name: convariance
description: Put Claude in your live conversation — an AI participant that listens to the room and contributes inline.

plugins.name: convariance
plugins.description: Convariance Cloud — hosted brainstorm sessions with live STT, signed in via OAuth. Ask Claude to start a brainstorm session.

plugins.name: convariance-local
plugins.description: Local, keyless convariance agent (npx convariance): bundled web UI, Web Speech API transcription, no account. Don't install alongside the hosted plugin — both register the same server name.
